title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.439 - Trooper James M. Bava Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Highway FF in Audrain County
text:
227.439.  Trooper James M. Bava Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Highway FF in Audrain County. — The portion of State Highway FF in Audrain County beginning at Elmwood Drive in the city of Mexico and extending west to County Road 977 shall be designated as "Trooper James M. Bava Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with costs to be paid for by private donations provided by the Missouri State Troopers Association.
(L. 2016 H.B. 2335 merged with S.B. 1009 § 227.441)
